title: Steal:01 The Name is Mouse
overview: For four hundred years, a family of thieves has plagued the world with a series of handicraft thefts. Under the motto of there is nothing you cannot steal, no matter the risk, now, under the name of MØUSE, which has passed from generation to generation, it is the turn of the twelfth successor: Muon Sorata to continue with the family trade together with the help of his three beautiful apprentices.

title: Steal:02 There Is Nothing that Mouse Cannot Steal
overview: They challenge MØUSE to rob the Odaiba tower, he accepts the challenge.

title: Steal:03 She Will Not Accept Destiny
Steal:04 Mouse Will Not Abandon a Comrade
overview: Muon has a date with Machiko before stealing the Tear from Muse.

title: Steal:05 Target Is Hatsuki
overview: Hatsuki tries a new machine created to erase memory, but it fails and leaves his consciousness inside the computer.

title: Steal:06 Country of Electronics' Mouse
overview: MØUSE enters the computer to "steal" Hatsuki, there he meets various Hatsuki personalities.

title: Steal:07 A Female University Student that Hates Men
overview: Tell the story before Yayoi joined the MØUSE team.

title: Steal:08 Sweet Awakening
overview: Yayoi's story continues, the events that finally make her want to be part of the MØUSE team are detailed.

title: Steal:09 The Name Is "Wang"
overview: Housu is an organization that is in charge of protecting objects of cultural value, so they send Wang to arrest MØUSE

title: Steal:10 Undying Man
overview: MØUSE is about to steal the Celestial Clock, this time the security measures are greater than ever.

title: Steal:11 Mouse Never Gives Up
overview: Wang has MØUSE cornered, he manages to turn the tables but Wang has one more hostage left.

title: Steal:12 Mouse's Dreams Will Never End
overview: Last chapter, everyone wants to please MØUSE.
